recent_calls.summary: The user called to speak to a specific person named Mister Hello but the conversation was very brief and ended abruptly. The agent identified herself and asked how she could help, but the user did not engage further before hanging up.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without further interaction.

The user called to speak with Nicole about making an appointment related to home warranty work for heating and cooling issues. The agent confirmed the nature of the request and transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance.

Angela Sevier called to schedule an appointment for air conditioner replacement or repair, providing her home warranty dispatch number and confirming her availability. The agent collected all necessary details and informed her that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her soon. Angela declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user, Knedi from American Home Shield, called to provide a dispatch number and request a technician visit for heating and AC issues. The agent confirmed the dispatch details and attempted to gather scheduling information for the technician visit. The call ended before the scheduling details were finalized.

The user called Budget but was actually trying to reach a different company, Lead Science, to schedule a meeting with one of the owners. The agent clarified the company and offered assistance, but the user declined further help and ended the call shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without further interaction.

Kevin called to reschedule his routine AC maintenance appointment. He was unsure about the preferred timing, so the agent noted his flexibility and informed him that a team member would follow up to finalize the appointment. The agent provided available time slots and confirmed the details with Kevin.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully. The call lasted 24 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to update the contact number for an appointment, specifying a new phone number to be used for communication. The user clarified that the service needed was electrical reconnection outside, but the agent informed them that Budget only handles heating, cooling, plumbing, and indoor air services. The call ended without scheduling any service due to the mismatch in service type.

The user called Budget Heating, Cooling, and Plumbing to confirm and reschedule a maintenance visit for an air conditioning leak. The appointment was successfully rescheduled to Monday between 8 AM and 4 PM. The user declined information about maintenance programs and confirmed the details with the virtual assistant.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate representative. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user, Carolyn Johnson, called to inquire about the arrival time of her service technician. The agent confirmed the appointment details and then transferred the call to customer service at the user's request. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.

George Olivas, a building commissioner with the city of Saint Peters, called to request a meeting with the homeowner and Daniel or Nick regarding the property at 622 Hemmel Lane. The meeting was requested for Friday afternoon around 2 PM, and the agent confirmed the details including George's phone number with extension. The call concluded with the user declining to provide feedback.

The user, Xiuli, called to report that they had not received the furnace replacement quote document after an in-person visit and requested a follow-up call as soon as possible. The agent confirmed the details and collected feedback, which was positive. The call ended successfully with the user's request noted for follow-up.

The user called to inquire about the possibility of an earlier appointment than the one scheduled for the evening of April 23rd. The agent confirmed the existing appointment with technician Daveiontay and informed the user that the technician would call prior to arrival. The user had no further questions or requests and ended the call.
The user called to pay a bill, but the agent informed them that billing information was not accessible and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.

The user called to confirm if the scheduled AC tune-up service could be completed without them being home and provided an access code for the technician. The agent confirmed the details and then transferred the call to a live agent upon the user's request. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.

The user, Darius Campbell, called to confirm an appointment scheduled for today between six and seven PM with technician Daveiontay. The agent confirmed the appointment details and the user had no changes or questions. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further assistance needed.

The user called to inquire about an appointment unrelated to home warranty work and identified themselves as the owner needing customer service. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user called and requested to speak to a human agent. The AI assistant confirmed it was not human and then transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

The user called to schedule an appointment for annual heating and cooling service, expressing interest in customer service assistance. The agent gathered some initial information but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer to another representative.

The user called after hours and spoke with Evie, Budget's after-hours assistant. The agent explained that a live representative was not available but offered to take down information for a follow-up. The user thanked the agent but hung up before providing details.

The user answered the call but did not engage in a conversation beyond a brief greeting. The agent introduced themselves and offered assistance, but the user did not respond further and ended the call.

The user, Cynthia Montit, reported that her cooling system installed last year is not working and she has been without air conditioning for over a week. The agent documented the issue, confirmed the service address and contact details, and scheduled a service visit for around noon the next day. Cynthia requested a call or text notification when the technician is on the way and provided positive feedback about the agent's assistance.

Jill called to schedule a walkthrough for a new heating and cooling system. The agent collected her preferences and contact details, confirmed the service address, and noted special instructions to call ahead. Jill provided positive feedback and the agent assured that the team would follow up on the next business day.

Melissa called to confirm her appointment for an electrical upgrade and furnace installation at 2004 Hilltop Drive scheduled for tomorrow at 10 AM. She requested the same installer who did the original work to complete the job and declined information about maintenance programs. The agent noted all details and informed her that the team would reach out to confirm the appointment.
The call was initiated but ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user hung up without responding or engaging further.

David called to inquire about a missed service appointment and wanted to either reschedule or get an update. The agent informed him that since it was after hours, a live person was not available, but his concerns were documented and a representative would contact him on the next business day. David confirmed his contact number and ended the call after receiving this information.

Steven called to request a callback for a quote on repairing or replacing a heating and cooling system at his work office. The agent confirmed his contact details and scheduled a callback for as soon as possible the next day. The call ended with no further questions from Steven.
The user called to reach Richard or Bridget but was informed they were unavailable. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent in the office and successfully transferred the call.

The user called to set up a visit for an estimate. The agent attempted to clarify if the estimate was related to a home warranty service but then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to return a call from Amy but was informed that Amy was unavailable. The agent, Sophie, attempted to assist and then transferred the call to another live agent for further help.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The call was very brief, with the agent attempting to start the conversation by asking for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user returned a missed call regarding their air conditioning and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call was brief and ended with a successful transfer to another agent.

The user called to reach the main office for payment assistance. The agent informed the user that they do not have direct access to billing information and transferred the call to the billing team for further help.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

David Harrell called to confirm if the technician was still coming today, as he thought the appointment was in the afternoon and had not received a call. The agent found the appointment scheduled for the morning and transferred the call to a live agent to check the technician's status. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent. The call was successfully transferred without further interaction.

The user, Almeida Billington, returned a call from Budget and was connected to the billing team by the agent Sophie, who did not have direct access to billing information. The call was transferred successfully to the appropriate department.
The user called looking specifically for Danielle and requested to be connected to extension 101. The agent attempted to assist but the call ended abruptly before the connection was completed.
The user called to follow up on a previous call regarding plumbing equipment. The agent acknowledged the inquiry and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief with the user unable to communicate clearly, and the agent attempted to assist but received no clear response before the user hung up.

The call was initiated by a survey representative from VRI interviewing, but the agent, Sophie, clarified she could not participate in the survey and offered assistance with Budget's services instead. The user seemed confused and repeated calls for Sophie before the call ended abruptly.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer promptly.

The user, Almeda Billington, called to inquire about the payment status of their Budget plan and whether it covers spring and fall checkups. The agent informed the user that they cannot access billing information directly but transferred the call to the billing team for further assistance.
